title: Not Enough Enchants
description: A mod that adds some QOL and fun enchants!
body:
This mod adds a bit more enchants to Minecraft, whether they're for fun, or for QOL.

# Currently Avaliable Enchants:

**Frost Bolt** - a crossbow enchant that, upon hitting a target, freezes them (like freezing an entity in powdered snow) for 200 ticks/10 seconds, reducing their movement speed and dealing a bit of damage. Cannot be combined with Quick Charge.

**Updraft** - a shovel enchant that, upon hitting a target whilst they're in mid-air, launches them up even further (about 5 blocks). This is pretty useful for combos.
